description: A long letter regarding a marriage case. A refernce is made to the ketubah and drinking of the cup as part of the betrothal ceremony. Sayyidna is mentioned throughout the letter, but the period can be determined. Cairo is also mentioned. needs further examination
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
